holdings.infoBox: TEC is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.68%, NVIDIA at 7.08%, Broadcom at 6.50%, Alphabet at 6.37%, and Lam Research at 5.15%.

overview.description: The Harbor Transformative Technologies ETF (TEC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in US companies of any size and sector the sub-adviser believes to have growth potential tied to transformative technologies. The fund seeks long-term capital growth. TEC was launched on Apr 16, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.
